# EWaste Kochi - Certified ITAD & E-Waste Recycling Kochi

Certified IT Asset Disposition (ITAD), Data Destruction, and E-Waste Recycling facility in Kerala, India.

## Core Services
- IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) for Kochi Businesses
- NIST 800-88 & DPDP Act 2023 Compliant Data Destruction
- Certified Laptop, MacBook, and Server Buyback
- KSPCB Authorized E-Waste Recycling Facility

## Facility Location
Near Thrippunithura, Kochi, Ernakulam, Kerala 682301

## Compliance Standards
- NIST Special Publication 800-88 Revision 1
- India Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act 2023
- Kerala State Pollution Control Board (KSPCB) Authorized

## Contacts
- Website: https://ewastekochi.com
- WhatsApp: +91 75005 55454
- Primary Hub: https://ewastekochi.com/contact.html
